---
title: "Notebook Library"
---

The daily schedule is the primary entry point for the Summer 2026 advanced pathway notebooks.

[Open the daily schedule](../schedule/schedule_2026_advanced.qmd)

## Summer 2026: Epidemic Modeling

| Session | Participant notebook | Solution notebook |
|---|---|---|
| Day 2 Session 1: Dynamical Systems | [Notebook](../project_1/materials/day2_s1_dynamicalSystem.ipynb) | [Solutions](../project_1/materials/day2_s1_dynamicalSystem_solutions.ipynb) |
| Day 2 Session 2: SIR Models | [Notebook](../project_1/materials/day2_s2_SIRmodels.ipynb) | [Solutions](../project_1/materials/day2_s2_SIRmodels_solutions.ipynb) |
| Day 2 Session 3: Grid Search | [Notebook](../project_1/materials/day2_s3_gridSearch.ipynb) | [Solutions](../project_1/materials/day2_s3_gridSearch_solutions.ipynb) |
| Day 2 Session 4: Optimization | [Notebook](../project_1/materials/day2_s4_Optimization.ipynb) | [Solutions](../project_1/materials/day2_s4_Optimization_solutions.ipynb) |
| Day 3 Session 1: Likelihood and Random Walk | [Notebook](../project_1/materials/day3_s1_LikelihoodRandomWalk.ipynb) | [Solutions](../project_1/materials/day3_s1_LikelihoodRandomWalk_solutions.ipynb) |
| Day 3 Session 2: MCMC with Real Data | [Notebook](../project_1/materials/day3_s2_MCMC_RealData_Forecast.ipynb) | [Solutions](../project_1/materials/day3_s2_MCMC_RealData_Forecast_solutions.ipynb) |
